entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: The cereal crop studied for productivity and growth improvements

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: SOIL QUALITY
entities.description: The overall health and functional capacity of the soil

entities.name: BIOCHAR
entities.description: A carbon-rich material produced from biomass used as a soil amendment

entities.name: CHEMICAL FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Synthetic nutrient supplements applied to soil to enhance plant growth

entities.name: INFERTILE SOILS
entities.description: Soils lacking sufficient nutrients to support optimal crop growth

entities.name: FERTILE SOILS
entities.description: Soils containing adequate nutrients for crop production

entities.name: NUTRIENT BIOCHAR
entities.description: Biochar produced from nutrient-rich feedstocks like manure

entities.name: STRUCTURAL BIOCHAR
entities.description: Biochar produced from structural feedstocks like wood chips

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The ability of the soil to provide essential nutrients to plants

entities.name: CROP PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall growth, health, and productivity of the crop

entities.name: SOIL STRUCTURAL PROPERTIES
entities.description: The physical arrangement and stability of soil particles

entities.name: POULTRY MANURE BIOCHAR
entities.description: Biochar derived specifically from poultry manure

entities.name: FARMYARD MANURE BIOCHAR
entities.description: Biochar derived specifically from farmyard manure

entities.name: WOOD CHIPS BIOCHAR
entities.description: Biochar derived specifically from wood chips

entities.name: KITCHEN WASTE BIOCHAR
entities.description: Biochar derived specifically from kitchen waste

entities.name: CLAY LOAM SOIL
entities.description: A specific soil texture consisting of a mixture of clay and loam

entities.name: NITROGEN UPTAKE
entities.description: The process and amount of nitrogen absorbed by the plant

entities.name: TOTAL CARBON
entities.description: The total amount of carbon sequestered in the soil

entities.name: MINERAL NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: The concentration of inorganic nitrogen available in the soil

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The weight of the harvested grain produced by the crop

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL YIELD
entities.description: The total biomass produced by the crop
